summary: Backend testing completed for Quiz and Dictionary multilingual API support. All 31 tests passed (Quiz: 11 tests, Dictionary: 17 tests, Backward Compatibility: 2 tests, Bible API Regression: 1 test). Quiz topics/questions are correctly translated across 6 languages. Dictionary terms return properly translated origin labels (Hebrew/Greek in respective languages) and term meanings (e.g., agape returns 'Bedingungslose Liebe' in German). Bible multi-language from iteration 1 continues to work.

minor.issue: Not all quiz topics are translated to all languages - Italian has 14 topics, other languages have fewer (en=3, es=4, de=2, fr=2, pt=2). This is expected behavior, not a bug.
Search only works against Italian base data (original content). Does not support multilingual search. Use Italian terms like 'amore' instead of 'love'.

context_for_next_testing_agent:
Quiz and Dictionary multilingual APIs verified. Key test endpoints:
- GET /api/quiz/topics?lang={lang} - Returns quiz topics in specified language (topic count varies by language)
- GET /api/quiz/{topic}?lang={lang} - Returns quiz questions translated
- GET /api/dictionary?lang={lang} - Returns dictionary terms with translated origin labels
- GET /api/dictionary/{term_id}?lang={lang} - Returns full term with translated meaning/description
- Dictionary search works only against Italian base data (use /api/dictionary/search/amore not /api/dictionary/search/love)

Bible multi-language tests from iteration_1 continue to pass (18/18). German correctly returns 'Psalmen' not Italian 'Salmi'.

key_validations: Quiz topics endpoint returns valid data for all 6 languages (it, en, es, de, fr, pt)
English quiz Genesis returns English title 'Genesis Quiz' and English questions
German quiz Genesis returns German questions
Dictionary search /api/dictionary/search/amore finds agape and chesed terms
Backward compatibility: Default lang=it works correctly
Bible API regression: German books still return 'Psalmen' not Italian fallback
